title: rosa lutea var. eglanteria
intro: Rosa lutea var. eglanteria, also known as the Eglanteria rose, is a type of wild rose that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, and is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa lutea var. eglanteria include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate menstrual cramps and promote relaxation.
